features.name: inout port with continuous assignment expression
features.description: Code should include an inout port used in a continuous assign statement within an arithmetic expression

features.name: undriven reg in assign expression
features.description: Code should include a reg declared without a driver that is referenced in a continuous assign expression

features.name: assign with constant-zero prefix and subtraction
features.description: Code should include a continuous assign with a trivial constant prefix (+0) followed by subtraction, creating a subtraction cell for wreduce optimization
